title: Sandro's Nook: Book and Cafe Store
description: A cozy café and bookstore experience powered by smart technology. Browse books, discover café favorites, and enjoy a seamless QR-based ordering and checkout system with a warm, inviting UI. Features smart inventory management and AI-powered recommendations for a more personalized customer experience.

title: PawPatrol: Pet Clinic
description: A modern pet care management system designed for clinics and pet owners. Manage appointments, pet records, vaccinations, and billing through a clean and user-friendly interface, making veterinary care more organized, efficient, and accessible.

title: Chapter Notes
description: A mobile book-tracking application built with Java and XML for readers who want to organize and monitor their reading journey. Users can manage their to-be-read list, track completed books, and rate their reading experience through a clean and user-friendly interface designed for efficient note-taking and reading management.

title: Midnight Coffee
description: Midnight Coffee is a café-inspired front-end website concept for a bookstore café where users can browse available books and explore the shop’s menu through a clean and cozy interface inspired by late-night coffee shop aesthetics.
